name: Golf Coach | Wade Fullingim Golf
about: Wade Fullingim Golf, located at Texas Wedge Indoor Golf in Lubbock, Texas, is a premier indoor golf training facility. The studio is owned and operated by certified golf coach Wade Fullingim and utilizes premium TrackMan technology for data-driven swing analysis. It specializes in personalized, one-on-one coaching programs designed to help golfers build lasting habits and improve their game through clear communication and customized practice plans. The focus is on long-term improvement rather than quick fixes, making it an ideal environment for dedicated golfers seeking structured, professional guidance.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional instruction from a coach with over 7,000 lessons of experience
Access to premium TrackMan technology for detailed video and data analysis
Personalized coaching plans focused on long-term, sustainable improvement

simulator_hardware.notes: Owned and used since 2015 for daily instruction

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is standard practice for coaching sessions to bring your own golf equipment. The facility may have club rentals available, but you should inquire directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a food and beverage service at the facility. As an indoor training studio, outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the duration for an 18-hole simulation. The focus is on coaching and practice sessions, and time would depend on the specific lesson plan or practice goals.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility is not marketed as a family-friendly venue. While junior golf coaching is a key service, the indoor training studio environment is geared towards focused, one-on-one instruction rather than casual family play.
